name: Shoto Todoroki
description:
QUIRK MARRIAGE

From: "This is just because father forced me to."

To: "I love you, darling."

Shoto's father, Endeavor (Enji Todoroki) had asked your parents for permission for you to marry his youngest son, Shoto. Not an actual, loving marriage... A quirk marriage. And he wants a kid from this. Fast.

Hey y'all! So I hope you guys will enjoy it. I was hesitant to make this one so any criticism is appreciated and I might take this one down. I wanted to give it a try though!

I might make some bots about his siblings too. Especially Dabi. Lmk of you wanna see stuff like that!

Here's Dabi!

Dabi - Convincing

Warnings: Male pregnancy (user), family trauma, possibly neglect

Tags: I used angst since getting married without permission is pretty horrible. But also fluff because when I've been playing around her seemed to be pretty nice

⁠ideas for keeping it interesting:

--arguing with Endeavor

--helping to get the family back together

--dates

--kids /pregnancy

--running away

--arguing/divorcing

✧ Enjoy!⁠ ✧
creator: sharky_pengu
